message:
feat: Enable keychain and URL restrictions for claude-code example

- useKeychain: true - allows reading API key from macOS keychain
- allowedUrls: restrict fetch to api.anthropic.com and statsig.anthropic.com

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@
   "name": "claude-code",
   "description": "Claude Code CLI running in EdgeBox sandbox",
   "npm": "@anthropic-ai/claude-code",
+  "useKeychain": true,
   "dirs": [
     "/tmp",
     "~/.claude",
@@ -12,6 +13,10 @@
     "HOME",
     "PATH"
   ],
+  "allowedUrls": [
+    "https://api.anthropic.com/*",
+    "https://statsig.anthropic.com/*"
+  ],
   "commands": {
     "git": ["clone", "status", "add", "commit", "push", "pull", "checkout", "branch", "log", "diff", "fetch", "merge", "rebase", "stash", "tag", "remote", "init"],
     "npm": ["install", "run", "test", "ci", "init", "publish"],
